resources.string: I-TalkBack iiwuhlelo lokufunda isikrini ikakhulukazi sabantu abanokungaboni kanye nokubona okuncane. Ivumela ukuhlanganyela nedivayisi kusetshenziswa impendulo ekhulunywayo.
Ibonisa uma izenzo zamakhasimende zikhona ngento yamanje.
Vula i-Talkback ukuze uthole imininingwane eyengeziwe
